name: tools
purpose: Choose broad tools for downstream exposure.

allowed_tools.description: Local files, repositories, shell, and workspace state.
Public web browsing, search, current public facts, URLs, and public docs.
Email, Slack, Teams, and other messaging state.
Documents, PDFs, slides, text files, and document editing.
Spreadsheets, CSV/TSV data, formulas, tables, and charts.
Tasks, tickets, boards, issues, roadmaps, and project systems.
GitHub, GitLab, CI/CD, deployments, package registries, and cloud developer services.
